title: Create: Structures Arise
description: This mod added 28 new create structures to your minecraft world.
body:
![main logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19c9eae0c83d2755354733dc41d9d56f30e1d76e.png)


Now in the new update 173.46.45 Release
![room](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b35c6cd2a3827a08f5ec69aa9bf9b53b41d373b.png)

![well](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e453b9fd1a6631c718b88222d7127630c3ac8e1_0.webp)

**FABRIC API IS REQUIRED FOR THE FABRIC VERSION!**

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

![discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f5b4e69f959c6aea82530470166d31152ccc1d7.png)

https://discord.com/invite/9UWsTm2svK

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

🩵 Brand New Discord Server! For Private Support and Update Alerts. 

 **Create: Structures Arise is a Forge mod that seamlessly blends the incredible engineering capabilities of the Create mod with dynamic, custom structures scattered across your Minecraft world. This mod introduces complex, interactive structures powered by Create’s intricate mechanical systems, turning exploration into an exciting adventure where automated machines, puzzles, and mechanical wonders await around every corner. Build, explore, and engage with advanced structures that take your gameplay to the next level!**

📢 Check here the create dev status. from here you can see when we also update to a higher version
🔗 https://wiki.createmod.net/users/development-status

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

### Note: 
⚠️ For bugs in the create mod you have to go to the official create mod itself.
